creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

  Here's the patchfile I've promised:

  This port has been tested under:
   * FreeBSD 3.0-980520-SNAP i386
   * FreeBSD 3.1-STABLE i386
  This port has been portlinted (0 fatal errors and 1 warnings found).

  The c-client4 shared library major number has been bumped from 4 to 5
(tracking the source tarball version).
  I've attached the archived patchfile.

  Thank you,
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)

--8<--
